title: Trusted By
subtitle: Institutions and businesses we partner with

items.name: Sri Shanmuga Educational Institutions
items.quote: Aligned campus readiness with industry expectations.
items.about: Sri Shanmuga Educational Institutions builds future-ready academic ecosystems with a focus on industry-aligned learning, campus readiness, and sustained student outcomes.

testimonials.quote: Working with UniqShift helped us move beyond reactive placement cycles and build a structured, industry-aligned readiness system for our students and faculty leadership.

items.name: Prathyusha Engineering College
items.quote: Stronger industry bridges for student outcomes.
items.about: Prathyusha Engineering College partners with industry to strengthen placement pathways, curriculum relevance, and graduate preparedness for real hiring expectations.

testimonials.quote: UniqShift strengthened our industry connections and helped us design programs that prepare graduates for real hiring expectations, not just academic milestones.

items.name: St Joseph College of Engineering
items.quote: Structured mentoring that scales across cohorts.
items.about: St Joseph College of Engineering is a leading engineering institution focused on industry-aligned learning, mentoring frameworks, and graduate readiness at scale.

testimonials.quote: Their mentoring frameworks and strategic advisory support helped us scale career readiness across cohorts while staying closely connected to industry needs.
UniqShift brought structure to our placement advisory conversations and helped us align campus initiatives with employer expectations.

items.name: Acadetours Global
items.quote: Clearer pathways from learning to opportunity.
items.about: Acadetours Global connects academic ecosystems with global learning opportunities, helping institutions and learners navigate clearer pathways from education to career growth.

testimonials.quote: Partnering with UniqShift gave us sharper go-to-market clarity and a more intentional bridge between academic ecosystems and global learning opportunities.
